mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_POSITION WHERE SUBNET_DN = #{subnetDn} AND ELEMENT_DN = #{elementDn}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_POSITION SET POS_X = #{posX}, POS_Y = #{posY}, WIDTH = #{width}, HEIGHT = #{height}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE SUBNET_DN = #{subnetDn} AND ELEMENT_DN = #{elementDn}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_TOPO_POSITION WHERE SUBNET_DN = #{subnetDn} AND ELEMENT_DN = #{elementDn}
